overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban street in Night City's Japantown district. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway past holographic advertisements, crosses a busy multi-lane intersection, and continues along the opposite sidewalk during golden hour lighting.

events.description: teal sports car drives past on the right side of the barriers
black sedan passes by on the road parallel to the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway, observing the futuristic vehicles passing by on the right

notable_agents.action: teal sports car driving along the road separated by yellow barriers

wooden barriers with red base separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle road
futuristic teal sports car with sleek design parked then moving along the road
tall concrete building facade with minimal windows on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered pedestrian walkway with a wooden slat roof overhead. Yellow barriers separate the walkway from a multi-lane road where futuristic vehicles including a teal sports car pass by. The lighting is diffused under the cover, with long shadows indicating late afternoon sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open intersection area
moving from shaded cover into direct golden hour sunlight creating long shadows
approaching crosswalk with multiple vehicles passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk to traverse the multi-lane intersection, observing traffic

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the same direction toward the intersection

entered.detail: large holographic display on building wall showing character with guitar and Japanese text
elevated highway overpass with Japanese signage reading '天下無双'
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway into an open urban intersection bathed in golden hour sunlight. A massive holographic billboard dominates the left wall displaying a character with a guitar. The camera approaches a crosswalk beneath an elevated highway overpass with Japanese signage, transitioning from shaded to direct lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with red advertisement walls

events.description: crossing the multi-lane road with various futuristic vehicles passing by
reaching the far sidewalk and continuing past parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing and continuing along the opposite sidewalk, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white pants walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: building facade covered in large red advertisements with white text reading 'DO YOU FEEL THE RUSH?'
line of parked futuristic cars along the curb including a light blue sedan
tall traffic light pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide intersection, passing through the crosswalk as various vehicles drive by. Upon reaching the far side, the scene features a prominent red building wall covered in large advertisements. The camera continues along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian while the overpass and holographic billboard recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shaded pedestrian corridor into the brilliant, open light of a bustling futuristic intersection. It begins under a wooden slat roof where diffused lighting and long shadows fall across yellow barriers and passing teal sports cars. As the camera exits the cover, the scene opens into a wide urban crossing bathed in golden hour sunlight, dominated by a massive holographic billboard of a guitarist and Japanese signage beneath an elevated highway overpass. The camera then moves through the crosswalk amidst flowing traffic before reaching the far sidewalk, where the lighting shifts against a prominent red building wall covered in advertisements. Finally, the view continues along the walkway past a pedestrian as the overpass and holographic displays recede into the distance.
